title: Bim Designer
description:
Bim Designer

Requirements:

  • Diploma or university graduate or above, major in Architecture, Civil Engineering or related subject., has theoretical knowledge and practical experience in building material, construction, interior design and decoration.
  • Project management, lead all local and overseas projects, including planning, coordination, implementation, execution, control and inspection of all projects. Submit a review analysis report to the board for each project after completion. Overseas experience is a must.
  • Communication and management of external related parties, liaise closely with clients, subcontractors, architects, consultants and authorities.
  • Create and explain design concepts of designing exterior and interior furnishings.

· Design detailed illustration of door and window two or four sides option and cutting list; Aluminum and glass partition cutting list, casement door and window accessories etc.

  • Able to produce 2D plans layout, elevations and sections drawings in AutoCAD / Illustrator .

Responsibilities:

· Excellent team management, set guidelines and provide expertise and supervision to the team.

· Provide guidance to engineers in relation to construction works, ensure the schedule is on schedule, maintain quality standards, ensure proper site management, and urge to solve technical problems in a timely manner.

Responsibilities:

· Build up Singapore ABS as prestigious brand technically both in Singapore and overseas market e.g., in Malaysia, Vietnam, Indonesia, Thailand, Burma, Hong Kong, Macau or China etc.

· Take perspective views, Plans, Elevations, and Represent the underlying interior design information.

· Highest level of AutoCAD skill is preferred.

· Hardworking and Good attitude in learning.

· Problem solving skills and good communication skills.

· Skilled at Critical thinking, Time Management, Problem solving and Teamwork.

· Site checking, Site Measuring and Supervision on ongoing projects.

· Provides conceptual design, Design development, Visualization, Rendering and Documentation.

postedCompany.description:
Since 1983, ABS Building Products PTE LTD has provided quality signage & building hardware products to the industry. We are the sole distributor of door hardware, such as Assa, Brio, Formani, Minusco, and DanSign / Modulex signage system etc which carry vast range of products .

We not only supply but also provide design specification works for both the contractors and designers market. Our Site supervisors are always available to ensure smooth completion of the projects undertaken.

Our sign system is easy to change but tamper to proof. There is no limit to the size of our sign as it can be extended or shortened by the addition or removal of profiles. At every stage, the signs remain visual complete and securely fastened. In addition to the range of profiles, colors and typefaces provides you with utmost versatility.

ABS’s passion for quality, simplicity and flexibility, reflects in the products. Products are designed skillfully and are made of superior quality materials providing solidity, durability, and above all, trust. The company’s overwhelming emphasis throughout ensures that each ABS product that reaches the user is not only beautiful in looks, but also extremely sturdy.

It is ABS’s endeavour to help you have the best design solutions. You visualize-choose the form, the function and the finish. Right from Revolving a door or window, to ControLling it, and from Operating, to Securing hardware there’s no chance of anything being overlooked. Rest assured you have the best combination of elegance, style, effectiveness and efficiency, with regard to all your architectural hardware and signage needs with ABS.

For more details, please visit www.absbuildingproduct.com/
